case_title: KYLEE WILSON ET AL VS. ELISABETH ROBINSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFFS KYLEE WILSON AND RUSSELL EASTMAN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELISABETH ROBINSON, REPRESENTED BY CHRISTA VETTER, DAUGHTER AND PREPERTY MANAGER FOR DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,585.86 FILED BY WILSON, KYLEE EASTMAN, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ELISABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2021 - JUDGMENT. MATTER PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 6-28-21.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.00) SERVED MAY-24-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ELISABETH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHRISTA VETTER, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ELISABETH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, KYLEE EASTMAN, RUSSELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ELISABETH $3,598.49 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,758.49, SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
